apps.name: Flero Client
apps.versionDescription: Flero v0.0.9-4 release build. Resolves crashing bugs on specific iOS revisions, refines the built-in click pack importer, and optimizes shader rendering.
apps.localizedDescription: The premier free Geometry Dash mod menu for iOS. Features 50+ built-in mods, Frame Stepper, custom click sounds, ImGui interface, and custom shaders without jailbreak or JIT.
